fields.label: API Key
fields.helpText: Create in Deepgram Console → API Keys → Create new API Key

healthcheck_config.description: Validates API key via list projects

metadata.summary: Deepgram speech-to-text, text-to-speech, and audio intelligence API for transcription, diarization, and voice AI.
metadata.setup_guide:
1. Sign up at deepgram.com (free tier includes $200 in credits)
2. Go to Console → API Keys
3. Create a new API Key with Member permissions (or higher)
4. Paste the key here

Note: Deepgram uses `Authorization: Token <key>` header, not `Bearer`.
